title: Bridge Essay: Modern Clinical Research on LSD.
concept: Self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, cosmic consciousness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
**Phase context:** Self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, cosmic consciousness.

**Modern Clinical Research on LSD.** — Neuropsychopharmacology (2017). DOI: 10.1038/npp.2017.86. PMID: 28447622. All modern clinical studies using the classic hallucinogen lysergic acid diethylamide (LSD) in healthy subjects or patients in the last 25 years are reviewed herein. There were five recent studies in healthy participants and one in patients. In a controlled setting, LSD acutely induced bliss, audiovisual synesthesia, altered meaning of perceptions, derealization, depersonalization, and mystical experiences.
